shell.title: Administration Portal
shell.subtitle: Control priorities, approvals, and operational load from a console separate from daily clinical work.

dashboard.title: The administrative portal already has a visible and proprietary entry point.
dashboard.desc: This first release organizes the administrative experience as a separate space from daily operational work, with an initial dashboard, anchor modules, and protected administration routes.
dashboard.loadError: Could not load the administration dashboard.
dashboard.queueLoadError: Could not load the action queue.

pendingNurses.label: Pending Nursing Profiles
pendingNurses.helper: Profiles administrative queue to complete clinical registration before unlocking operational access.

waitingAssignment.label: Requests Awaiting Assignment
waitingAssignment.helper: Identifies cases waiting for an assigned nurse before approval.

readyApproval.label: Requests Ready for Approval
readyApproval.helper: Gathers already-assigned requests that only require final administrative decision.

rejectedToday.label: Requests Rejected Today
rejectedToday.helper: Provides a quick overview of recent rejections for commercial or operational tracking.

approvedIncomplete.label: Approved Requests Without Closure
approvedIncomplete.helper: Measures authorized work that remains open and needs follow-up.

overdueStale.label: Overdue or Stalled Requests
overdueStale.helper: Flags services with passed dates or pending requests stalled for over 48 hours.

activeNurses.label: Active Nurses
activeNurses.helper: Summarizes the currently available operational capacity for assignment.

activeClients.label: Active Clients
activeClients.helper: Summarizes the available base for administrative management, historical queries, and requests created on behalf of the client.

unreadNotifications.label: Unread Administrative Notifications
unreadNotifications.helper: Measures the active alert load and opens the administrative notification tray.

dashboard.visibilityDesc1: Prioritize profiles, assignments, and approvals from a desktop-centered dashboard.
dashboard.visibilityDesc2: Dashboard cards link directly to relevant modules. The initial definition of overdue or stalled requests is based on services dated before today or pending undated requests stalled for over 48 hours.
dashboard.actionQueueDesc: The priority queue separates actionable work from notifications.
dashboard.noActions: There are no pending actions at this moment.
dashboard.criticalAlertsDesc: Area reserved for critical business incidents
dashboard.noAlerts: There are no automated critical alerts yet. This block is reserved for the portal alert center.

adminPayroll.title: Manage and supervise pay periods for nursing staff.
adminPayroll.description: Create and close payroll periods, review compensations per nurse and export reports in CSV format for external analysis.

errors.detailFailed: Could not load the period detail.
errors.createFailed: Could not create the payroll period.
errors.closeFailed: Could not close the payroll period.

adminCompensationRules.title: Manage rules that determine how nursing compensation is calculated.
adminCompensationRules.description: Create, edit and deactivate compensation rules by employment type. These rules affect automatic payroll calculations.

adminDeductions.title: Manage deductions applied to nursing compensation.
adminDeductions.description: Add fixed or percentage deductions per nurse or payroll period.

adminAdjustments.title: Manual adjustments to calculated compensation.
adminAdjustments.description: Add positive or negative adjustments on specific service executions.

adminShifts.title: Manage scheduled shifts for nursing staff.
adminShifts.description: View shifts by nurse or request, review change history and manage scheduling.
